But note that in Java, we have to handle the long type to avoid integer overflow. Because for nums[i] up to 1e6, multiplied by 1e6, gives 1e12, which is within long.

class Solution {
    public long maximumTripletValue(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        long[] maxLeft = new long[n];
        maxLeft[0] = (long) nums[0];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            maxLeft[i] = Math.max(maxLeft[i-1], (long) nums[i]);
        }
        
        long[] diff = new long[n];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; j++) {
            diff[j] = maxLeft[j-1] - (long) nums[j];
        }
        
        long[] prefixMax = new long[n];
        prefixMax[0] = diff[0]; // but j starts from 1. Hmm, need to adjust.
        // Wait for j=1, prefixMax[1] = diff[1]. For m >=1:
        prefixMax[1] = diff[1];
        for (int m = 2; m < n; m++) {
            prefixMax[m] = Math.max(prefixMax[m-1], diff[m]);
        }
        
        long maxResult = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; k++) {
            long currentMaxDiff = prefixMax[k-1];
            long currentValue = currentMaxDiff * (long) nums[k];
            if (currentValue > maxResult) {
                maxResult = currentValue;
            }
        }
        return maxResult > 0 ? maxResult : 0;
    }
}

class Solution {
    public long maximumTripletValue(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        long[] maxLeft = new long[n];
        maxLeft[0] = (long) nums[0];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            maxLeft[i] = Math.max(maxLeft[i-1], (long) nums[i]);
        }
        
        long[] diff = new long[n];
        for (int j = 1; j < n; j++) {
            diff[j] = maxLeft[j-1] - (long) nums[j];
        }
        
        long[] prefixMax = new long[n];
        prefixMax[1] = diff[1];
        for (int m = 2; m < n; m++) {
            prefixMax[m] = Math.max(prefixMax[m-1], diff[m]);
        }
        
        long maxResult = 0;
        for (int k = 2; k < n; k++) {
            long currentMaxDiff = prefixMax[k-1];
            long currentValue = currentMaxDiff * (long) nums[k];
            if (currentValue > maxResult) {
                maxResult = currentValue;
            }
        }
        return maxResult > 0 ? maxResult : 0;
    }
}

class Solution {
    public long maximumTripletValue(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        long[] maxLeft = new long[n];

            maxLeft[i] = Math.max(maxLeft[i - 1], (long) nums[i]);
        }
